name: HMAC

documentation.description:
Library-level alias so users don't need to "with System.Storage_Elements"
directly. Byte_Array is semantically identical to
System.Storage_Elements.Storage_Array.

subprograms.name: Compute
Equal
subprograms.code: function Equal (Left, Right : HMAC_Digest) return Boolean

subprograms.code:
procedure Finalize (Ctx    : in out Context;
                    Digest : out HMAC_Digest)

subprograms.name: Initialize
subprograms.code:
procedure Initialize (Ctx : out Context;
                      Key  : Byte_Array)

subprograms.name: Update
subprograms.code:
procedure Update (Ctx  : in out Context;
                  Data : Byte_Array)

formals.name: Hash_Final
formals.code:
procedure Hash_Final (Ctx    : in out Hash_Context;
                      Digest : out System.Storage_Elements.Storage_Array)

formals.name: Hash_Update
formals.code:
procedure Hash_Update (Ctx  : in out Hash_Context;
                       Data : System.Storage_Elements.Storage_Array)
